revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required: (1) rep_intent.summary must be changed from 'reactive' to 'not_assessable' — Stage 3 correctly states intent cannot be assessed but then contradicts itself by assigning a characterization. (2) cherry_pick_moments[0] schema reference must be corrected — bill_collection.alternative_paths is not applicable to a voicemail-connect; Stage 3 should note this as a schema gap (no voicemail protocol defined) rather than forcing a mismatched reference. (3) cherry_pick_moments[3] schema reference must be corrected — bill_collection.stewart_automated_bill_capture is a product roadmap section, not a transcript pipeline QA section; the infrastructure flag should be noted as outside schema scope. (4) cherry_pick_moments[1] coaching implication must be made conditional — the 'paycheck-protection' framing presupposes a paid lead, but lead type is unknown for this call_id; rephrase as 'IF this is a paid lead' throughout. No fabricated quotes found. Outcome dispute is valid and should be retained as-is.
